author: AHAlwagdani
title: I like it… but
content:
This app is honestly the closest thing to Poweramp available on Android, but a few major pain points keep it from being perfect.
1. Infuriatingly Slow Syncing
I cannot emphasize this enough: the syncing feature is a nightmare. Even when I add just two new songs to my Dropbox, the app triggers a full sync that can last for an hour. For a cloud-based music player, efficient syncing is the most critical feature, and currently, it feels incredibly broken.
2. Lack of a Quick Shuffle
The app desperately needs a "Shuffle All" button that is accessible from anywhere. Currently, I have to navigate to specific sections just to start a shuffle. Furthermore, if I search for a song and hit shuffle, it only plays through the filtered search results rather than the entire library. When I want to shuffle, I mean my entire collection, regardless of the folder I’m currently in.
3. Non-Recursive Search
The search function should work recursively by default. It is tedious to manually select "this folder and other folders" every single time I want to find a track. Search should look through the entire library unless specified otherwise.
Final Thoughts:
The app is good, and I often feel like I have to use it because there aren't many other viable alternatives. However, these UX hurdles make the daily experience frustrating. Please, developer, address these issues!
